name: Julie's Molded Crab and Cracker Dip
recipeIngredient: 10 1/2 oz Cream of celery soup (1 can)
16 oz Frozen crab meat, thawed (1 package)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cream of celery soup and cream cheese in a saucepan. Heat on low setting until hot.
2. Soften the gelatin in water. Add the soup mixture, blending well.
3. Stir in chopped green onions, diced celery, and thawed crab meat.
4. Remove from heat and add mayonnaise.
5. Pour into a mold and refrigerate overnight or until set.
6. Serve with crackers.
